## ✅ Contributor Checklist
- [ ] I followed the folder and file naming conventions
- [ ] I did not modify protected files (`_config.yml`, `_data`, `_layouts`, etc.)
- [ ] All content is translated into the target language
- [ ] Code snippets and commands are unchanged
- [ ] Links and images are working correctly
- [ ] Markdown formatting is valid
- [ ] No unnecessary files are included

---

## 🔍 Moderator Checklist
- [ ] Structure and naming conventions are correct
- [ ] No protected files were modified
- [ ] Translation quality is acceptable
- [ ] Links and media are working
- [ ] Markdown renders correctly
- [ ] No unintended changes in diff
- [ ] PR is ready to merge
